visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen arrangement. On the right, a young female creator with long dark hair and a white collared shirt under a black dress looks at the camera with a surprised expression. On the left, an inset video shows a man in a professional kitchen wearing a grey sweatshirt and blue gloves, using a wire cutter to slice through a massive, multi-colored stack of marshmallows. The setting is bright with studio-style lighting. (2) The creator transitions to a solo view, holding a large, brick-shaped pink marshmallow package labeled 'Strawberry Milk'. She holds the product close to the lens, revealing a dense texture topped with dried red strawberry pieces and sprinkles. She is indoors in a domestic setting with soft, warm background objects. (3) She opens the package and takes a large bite out of the pink marshmallow. Her facial expressions are exaggerated to show enjoyment, and her eyes widen as she chews. She holds a small black Rode wireless microphone near her mouth to emphasize the eating process. The internal texture of the marshmallow appears airy with visible gas pockets. (4) The scene shifts to the creator holding a long, rainbow-colored marshmallow block. She uses both hands to stretch the flexible snack, demonstrating its elastic property before taking a substantial bite. She remains in the same eye-level medium close-up framing, focusing entirely on the food product and her reaction. (5) The final segment shows her eating a blue marshmallow covered in small, multi-colored candy spheres. She bites into the crunchy topping and smiles, pointing at the unique texture of the blue block. Yellow and white captions continue to appear at the bottom, and she concludes by gesturing towards the camera with the half-eaten snack.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: @themarshmallowco. [Slogan]: 美國·韓國爆紅到不行 磚頭棉花糖. (2) [Subtitle]: 台灣買不到？ 6 Marshmallows!!! 美國·韓國已爆紅 手工巨無霸棉花糖 有超多種口味.... 實驗歐膩. (3) [Subtitle]: 買了！！！ 這是彩虹口味 這個是草莓牛奶口味 還有他們免費送一個口味 好Q彈喔. (4) [Subtitle]: 手工棉花糖果然... 好好吃！！！！ 這個跟一般烤肉用棉花糖根本不能比較 我人生中吃過的Marshmallow中 它是第一名. (5) [Subtitle]: Q彈鬆軟到好像在吃人類不能吃的東西的感覺... 上面有冷凍乾燥草莓脆片 味道超讚 比想像中還不甜！ 聽得到嗎？ 好像在玩史萊姆... (6) [Subtitle]: 味道又不一樣！！！ Q彈度一樣好喔 (沒有在吃橡膠泥喔) 因為是手工棉花糖 裡面有氣泡層 咬下去的時候很有口感！ (類似這樣) (7) [Subtitle]: 最後一個口味 大家知道是什麼嗎？ 請底下留言猜猜看 (可以聽看看聲音).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 man appearing in the inset kitchen video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white shirt under a black jumper.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary scene is a home interior with a plain wall and shelf. The inset scene is a professional kitchen with stainless steel equipment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-paced and upbeat electronic pop background track begins playing. A female voice with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone introduces the oversized marshmallow product. The vocal delivery is energetic, matching the bright music. (2) A sharp crinkling sound of plastic film triggers a new phase as the creator opens the first snack. The music maintains its tempo, but the ambient layer captures the physical texture of the packaging. (3) A series of loud, distinct, and high-frequency crunching sounds dominates the track as the creator bites into the marshmallow. These sounds are recorded with high sensitivity, emphasizing the crispiness of the toppings. (4) A digital 'pop' sound effect marks a transition to the next product. The creator's voice exhibits high arousal and rising intonation as she describes the unique 'slime-like' stretching of the rainbow marshmallow. (5) Friction sounds resembling squishing are heard as the creator manipulates the marshmallow close to the microphone. More percussive biting sounds follow as she eats the blue block's candy coating, concluding with a friendly question to the viewers.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item 1 Showcase/Eating -> Item 2 Showcase/Eating -> Item 3 Showcase/Eating -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and showcase viral giant marshmallows from 'The Marshmallow Co', utilizing high-sensitivity audio (ASMR) to highlight their unique textures and eating sounds for audience engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides a dedicated review for a specific brand, displaying their logo and product prominently.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video blends standard vlog-style food review with ASMR techniques, specifically focusing on the acoustic qualities of the snacks.
